PowerShell($res = 'C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\OpenAI.Codex_26.715.4045.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\\app\\resources'; "=== 소유자/ACL ==="; \(Get-Acl "$res\\app.asar"\).Owner; "=== Electron Fuses \(asar integrity\) 흔적 검사 ==="; $exe = 'C:\\Program Files\\WindowsApps\\OpenAI.Codex_26.715.4045.0_x64__2p2nqsd0c76g0\\app\\resources\\codex.exe'; $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes\($exe\); $sentinel = [System.Text.Encoding]::ASCII.GetBytes\('dL7pKGdnNz796PbbjQWNKmHXBZaB9tsX'\); $idx = -1; for \($i=0; $i -lt \($bytes.Length - $sentinel.Length\); $i++\) { $match=$true; for \($j=0; $j -lt $sentinel.Length; $j++\){ if\($bytes[$i+$j] -ne $sentinel[$j]\){$match=$false;break} }; if\($match\){$idx=$i;break} }; if\($idx -ge 0\){ "Fuse sentinel found @ $idx"; "Fuse bytes \(version+flags\): " + \(\($bytes[\($idx+$sentinel.Length\)..\($idx+$sentinel.Length+10\)]\) -join ','\) } else { "Fuse sentinel NOT found in codex.exe \(fuses may be off or different binary\)" })
